flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at North Arkansas College fell 19% between 2009 and 2010 (13.2% → 10.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Arkansas College fell 19% between 2007 and 2010 (23.3% → 18.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Arkansas College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Arkansas College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).
